description: After the activity-page index/query work and CPU cap of 0.5, capture a fresh latency baseline. Use middleware timing (handler spans miss Jinja render). Checklist of known traps to inspect: CPU cap drift, `now` name shadowing, `cache_stats` SELECT scan, public ESI `db` flag default, token-refresh serialization. Identify the top 3 slow routes and file remediation issues. Also confirm killmails v2 stays within 2 req/s ESI budget and disk-first skip works (folds in the prior killmails backfill review). Measurement only — no code change here.
title: Re-baseline page-load perf with VIGILANT_PERF_LOG=1
